summary: Iteration 46: Complete testing of 3 new feature sets - Customer-facing order display improvements, Advanced export options for loans/attendance/leaves, and Mobile POS/Waiter optimizations. All backend APIs (8/8) passed, all frontend features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 tested 3 feature sets. All features working correctly: (1) Order Status Page at /order-status is public, has dark theme, orange gradient header, live clock, status summary bar, empty state, responsive stacking layout. (2) Export endpoints POST /api/export/data work for type=loans/attendance/leaves with format=excel/pdf. ExportButton component used on /loans, /leave-approvals, /employees pages with dialogs showing Excel/PDF options. (3) Mobile POS/Waiter have slide-in cart overlay, floating cart bar at bottom, responsive 2-column grids, hidden stats on mobile. All data-testid attributes working correctly.

order_status_page.status_summary_bar: PASS - Shows Preparing and Ready counts
order_status_page.responsive_layout: PASS - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 stacks on mobile

mobile_pos_optimizations.floating_cart_bar: PASS - data-testid=pos-mobile-cart-bar visible when items in cart
mobile_pos_optimizations.cart_slide_in_overlay: PASS - Cart opens from right on mobile

mobile_waiter_optimizations.floating_cart_bar: PASS - data-testid=mobile-cart-bar visible when items in cart
